title: textrank review

key_sentences.sentence: Climate change poses significant challenges to global food security, yet many current models fail to capture the complexity of regional adaptation strategies.
This paper introduces a multi‑agent simulation framework that integrates economic, ecological, and social variables to predict agricultural resilience under varying climate scenarios.
Our experiments reveal that mid‑sized farming communities adopting cooperative resource‑sharing outperform both small independent farms and large industrial operations in long‑term sustainability.
Interestingly, the results also show that technological innovation alone is insufficient without parallel investment in social infrastructure.
We conclude by highlighting policy implications for governments seeking to balance innovation funding with community‑level support programs.

results.abstractive_summary: Climate change poses significant challenges to global food security, yet many current models fail to capture the complexity of regional adaptation strategies . This paper introduces a multi‑agent simulation framework that integrates economic, ecological, and social variables to predict agricultural resilience under varying climate scenarios .

key_sentences.sentence: The rapid growth of scientific literature has made manual review increasingly difficult for researchers.
Traditional methods rely on reading abstracts and full texts, which is time-consuming and prone to bias.
Abstractive models such as BART generate novel summaries but risk hallucinations without grounding.
This work proposes a hybrid approach combining TextRank for faithful extraction with fine-tuned transformers for coherent multi-document abstraction.
Experiments on arXiv abstracts show improved ROUGE scores and theme coverage compared to single-method baselines.

results.abstractive_summary: Traditional methods rely on reading abstracts and full texts, which is time-consuming and prone to bias . This work proposes a hybrid approach combining TextRank for faithful extraction with fine-tuned transformers for coherent multi-document abstraction . Experiments on arXiv abstracts show improved ROUGE scores and theme coverage compared to single-method baselines .

key_sentences.sentence: In the proposed approach, TextRank and Legal Pegasus are integrated to improve the performance.
This is done by comparing the summaries generated and the reference summaries provided in the dataset.
Experimental results show that TextRank achieves ROUGE-1, ROUGE-2, and ROUGE-L scores of $0.2159,0.1633$, and 0.1366, respectively, while LexRank provides 0.1966, 0.1071, and 0.127.
The proposed approach which integrates TextRank and Legal Pegasus outperforms the individual TextRank and Legl Pegasus models.
It achieves ROUGE-1, ROUGE-2, and ROUGE-L scores of 0.2795, 0.1383, and 0.1677, thus contributing improved structural preservation and content overlap.

results.abstractive_summary: In the proposed approach, TextRank and Legal Pegasus are integrated to improve the performance . TextRank achieves ROUGE-1, RouGE-2, and Rouge-L scores of $0.2159,0.1633$, and 0.1366, respectively, while LexRank provides 0.1966, 0.1071, and  0.127.127 .

overall_synthesis: Climate change poses significant challenges to global food security, yet many current models fail to capture the complexity of regional adaptation strategies . Traditional methods rely on reading abstracts and full texts, which is time-consuming and prone to bias . This work proposes a hybrid approach combining TextRank for faithful extraction with fine-tuned transformers for coherent multi-document abstraction .
